name: string-unicode-scalar-length
note: Locks a confirmed GOOD behavior: length counts Unicode scalar values in both runtimes (TS Array.from().length, Rust chars().count()), not UTF-16 code units. Two astral emoji = length 2, so max_len 2 passes. If anyone regresses TS to .length (UTF-16), this goes red (each emoji would count as 2).
